headline: TKO Balances WrestleMania Gaming Expansion With US$2b Buyback Commitment
summary: TKO Group Holdings (NYSE:TKO) has launched an exclusive WWE branded online slot game with Fanatics Casino. The company has arranged amended credit facilities that support a planned US$2b share buyback program. These moves combine a new digital product launch with sizable capital allocation decisions that are material for shareholders. TKO Group Holdings brings together WWE and UFC under one umbrella, with media rights, live events, consumer products and licensing as core revenue streams...
